notes: Only tried the tutorial but the game ran great. Everything was smooth.
title: Company of Heroes: Opposing Fronts

notes: After disabling D3d11, game would play.  Otherwise, it only showed a black screen with audio in the background (intro credits).  No man menu displayed.  I got a crash during the performance test on full detail settings.  Otherwise, it ran and played flawlessly.
title: Company of Heroes: Opposing Fronts

notes:
Runs perfectly form some skirmishes i did.
But regrettably it cannot detect that i also have the other company games and so it doesn't allow me to play in skirmish the Wehrmacht and the US army.
Same goes for all other company games i tried.
